purpose: Prevent prompt injection attacks against agents
enforcement_point: TaskManager.createTask() - before task reaches any agent

evidence_items.source_validation: Must reference existing file path or known log format

allowlist: never invent fields, tables, APIs, regions, or files
skeptic must produce a materially different theory
no edits until the plan is approved
constraints.note: Only CLAUDE.md rules are valid constraints. Any constraint not in this allowlist is rejected.
